briefs.title: BC Strata Rules Updated: Who Qualifies to Inspect Buildings and Depreciation Reports
briefs.summary: BC updated its Strata Property Regulation to clarify which professionals can conduct building inspections and prepare depreciation reports (long-term repair cost plans) for strata corporations (condo and townhouse complexes). The updated rules now explicitly include professional licensee engineers and certified technicians registered with recognized BC professional bodies as qualified persons for these roles.
briefs.action_required: If your strata hires inspectors or depreciation report writers, confirm they hold current registration with an approved BC professional body.
briefs.industries: Landlord & Property Mgmt, Construction & Development, Professional Services
